rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into component implementations when binding implementation-level details, and into component types for structural assumptions and guarantees.
generic_rules: Preserve the AADL component hierarchy when inserting annexes; do not alter ownership or scope boundaries.
Ensure annex content reflects the scope of its target—type-level for structural contracts, implementation-level for bindings.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes use the syntax: annex agree {** ... **};
anti_patterns: Do not insert AGREE annexes into non-component elements or outside valid AADL scope boundaries.
irrelevant_topics: eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;
